_description: Location registry. Each location is a distinct physical space. Time-of-day conditions are modelled as 'variants' within a location, not as separate entries.

locations.name: The Office
locations.description: An open-plan office. Desks arranged in clusters that create accidental intimacy. The kind of space where nothing is private — and everyone knows it.

variants.label: Morning
variants.description: The office at 8:30 AM. Fluorescent white, monitors cold blue. Every desk already occupied — nobody was first. The space hasn't been claimed yet, but the power dynamics are already visible in where people sit.
variants.lighting_summary: Fluorescent overhead (cold white) + east window morning backlight (amber rim). Blue accent: monitor glow only.

shots.label: Wide — from entrance
shots.description: Full open plan visible. Desks recede into depth. East windows create morning backlight.
shots.use_for: Establishing Scene 1. Showing scale. Nothing is private.
shots.prompt_suffix: wide establishing shot from entrance doorway, desk clusters receding into depth, east windows with morning backlight, fluorescent overhead lights, morning

shots.label: Medium — desk cluster
shots.description: Two desks face-to-face. Papers, monitors, coffee. Fluorescent directly above.
shots.use_for: Dialogue scenes at desks. A negotiation table nobody agreed to.
shots.prompt_suffix: medium shot at desk cluster, two desks face-to-face, papers monitors coffee cups, waist-level camera, fluorescent overhead, morning

shots.label: Detail — printer alcove
shots.description: Printer output tray in dim back-left corner. Empty and waiting.
shots.prompt_suffix: close detail shot office printer alcove, laser printer, empty output tray, dim corner, power cable, morning

variants.label: Night
variants.description: The same office at 11 PM — now it belongs to no one. Security spots isolate three desk clusters in amber. Everything else is deep shadow. The printer alcove is the only point of interest.
variants.lighting_summary: Security spotlights (amber) on 3 clusters + printer alcove. One computer blue glow. Printer green LED. Rest: deep shadow.

shots.label: Wide — from entrance (night)
shots.description: Amber pools on a few clusters, rest in shadow. Printer alcove is the brightest point.
shots.use_for: Opening Scene 2. Establishing emptiness and focal hierarchy.
shots.prompt_suffix: wide shot from entrance, office 11PM, security spotlight amber pools, deep shadow, printer alcove as brightest point, empty

shots.label: Medium — printer alcove (night)
shots.description: Printer under its security spot. Hard amber circle. Folded letter in the output tray. Green LED.
shots.use_for: The discovery moment. The letter as subject.
shots.prompt_suffix: medium shot printer alcove night, hard amber security spotlight, printer with green LED, folded letter in output tray, deep shadow

shots.label: Detail — the letter (night)
shots.description: Extreme close-up of the letter in the tray. Amber catches the top edge. Everything else: shadow.
shots.use_for: The beat where CHARACTER_A sees it. Maximum narrative weight.
shots.prompt_suffix: extreme close-up printer output tray side-on, folded document letter, amber light catching top edge, deep shadow

locations.name: The Café
locations.description: A neutral, uninspired café chosen precisely because it belongs to neither character. Coffee orders become a language here.
locations.lighting_summary: One amber pendant over the middle table. All other light: flat cool ambient. Rain window: diffused grey.

shots.label: Wide — from entrance
shots.description: Full café. Counter at back. 6-8 tables. Pendant over middle table. Two cups. Rain window right.
shots.prompt_suffix: wide establishing shot café from entrance, counter at back, 8 tables generic chairs, rain window right, amber pendant over one table, two coffee cups

shots.label: Medium — the table
shots.description: Two cups opposite each other — one with spoon, one without. Amber pendant above.
shots.prompt_suffix: medium shot café table at sitting height, two coffee cups opposite, one spoon in saucer, amber pendant above, rain window soft background

shots.label: Detail — the rain window
shots.description: Rain streaks on glass. Street blurred grey. Amber pendant reflected.
shots.use_for: Scene 3 pause beats. The window is an exit that doesn't open.
shots.prompt_suffix: close shot rain-streaked café window from inside, street blurred grey, amber pendant reflection in glass, diagonal rain lines
